reason: The preregistered google/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-09-2025 endpoint is retired on OpenRouter and returned HTTP 404 with no available endpoint. Use the currently available stable google/gemini-2.5-flash checkpoint while preserving the released AA grading prompt, parsing, label mapping, temperature, reasoning setting, and failure policy.

adapter_deviations_from_pinned_notebook.transport: OpenRouter exact-provider route instead of the direct OpenAI client
adapter_deviations_from_pinned_notebook.temperature: explicit zero instead of an omitted provider default
adapter_deviations_from_pinned_notebook.parsing: atomic A/B/C label only instead of regex and keyword recovery
adapter_deviations_from_pinned_notebook.attempts: up to three transient retries instead of one invocation
adapter_deviations_from_pinned_notebook.terminal_failure: unscorable U instead of defaulting an unparseable response to C/not-attempted

reporting_requirement: Label all AA automated outcomes as stable-Gemini-2.5-Flash rubric grades and do not claim exact grader-checkpoint comparability with the released preview-based implementation. Describe SimpleQA outcomes as released-rubric GPT-4.1 grades under the study's fail-closed OpenRouter adapter, not exact execution of the pinned starter notebook.
